departments.name: OPD / Registration
departments.directions: Enter from Gate 1 (Main Gate on JLN Hospital Road). Walk straight inside, OPD registration counters are on the right side of the main corridor.
departments.directions_hindi: मुख्य गेट 1 से प्रवेश करें और सीधे चलें, ओपीडी काउंटर दाईं ओर है।
departments.landmark: Look for the Blue Floor Strip

departments.name: Eye OPD (Ophthalmology)
departments.directions: Enter Gate 1 or Gate 3, follow Blue strip. Eye OPD is in the main OPD corridor.
departments.directions_hindi: गेट 1 या गेट 3 से अंदर आएं, नीली पट्टी का पालन करें।
departments.landmark: Follow Blue Floor Strip from Gate 1

departments.name: ENT OPD (Ear, Nose & Throat)
departments.directions: Enter Gate 1, follow Blue strip to main OPD block.
departments.directions_hindi: गेट 1 से अंदर आएं, नीली पट्टी का पालन करें।

departments.name: Orthopaedic OPD
departments.directions: Use Gate 4 on Lohagal Road. Orthopaedic OPD is in the left wing, follow Blue strip.
departments.directions_hindi: लोहागल रोड पर गेट 4 से प्रवेश करें, बाईं ओर हड्डी रोग विभाग है।

departments.name: Emergency / Casualty
departments.directions: Use Gate 2 on Hospital Road (East Side). Emergency ward is immediately visible. RED strip leads directly.
departments.directions_hindi: हॉस्पिटल रोड पर गेट 2 का उपयोग करें। आपातकाल विभाग तुरंत दाईं ओर है।

departments.name: Cardiology (Heart)
departments.directions: Enter Gate 2, follow Red strip. Cardiothoracic Surgery is on the 2nd floor. Sign reads 'कार्डियोथोरेसिक सर्जरी विभाग'.
departments.directions_hindi: गेट 2 से प्रवेश करें, लाल पट्टी का पालन करें, दूसरी मंजिल पर हृदय रोग विभाग है।

departments.name: X-Ray / Pathology Lab
departments.directions: Enter Gate 1 or Gate 6. Follow Green strip to the central diagnostic block.
departments.directions_hindi: गेट 1 या गेट 6 से अंदर आएं, हरी पट्टी का पालन करें।

departments.name: MRI / CT Scan
departments.directions: Enter Gate 6, follow Green strip to the Radiology/MRI section.
departments.directions_hindi: गेट 6 से प्रवेश करें, हरी पट्टी का पालन करें।

departments.name: Drug Distribution Centre
departments.directions: Enter Gate 1 or Gate 3. Drug Distribution Centres (No. 2, 13, 17) are in the main corridor.
departments.directions_hindi: गेट 1 या 3 से प्रवेश करें, मुख्य गलियारे में दवा वितरण केंद्र है।

departments.name: Medical Shop / Jan Aushadhi
departments.hindi: दवाई की दुकान / जन औषधि केंद्र
departments.directions: Near Gate 4. The Co-op Medical Shop (Vikray Kendra) and Jan Aushadhi Kendra are at the Administrative Block.
departments.directions_hindi: गेट 4 के पास, प्रशासनिक भवन के नीचे दवाई की दुकान है।
departments.landmark: Yellow Floor Strip – Near Admin Block

departments.name: Administrative Block (Prashashnik Bhawan)
departments.directions: Enter Gate 4, turn right. The Prashashnik Bhawan (pink-striped 3-floor building) is visible.
departments.directions_hindi: गेट 4 से प्रवेश करें और दाईं ओर मुड़ें, गुलाबी रंग की इमारत प्रशासनिक भवन है।
departments.landmark: Yellow Floor Strip – Pink Building near Gate 4

departments.name: Canteen / Food Centre
departments.directions: Near Gate 2/Emergency area. Sansity Bhojnalaya canteen is on the left side near emergency.
departments.directions_hindi: गेट 2 के पास, आपातकाल विभाग के बाईं ओर कैंटीन है।
departments.landmark: Yellow Floor Strip – Near Emergency Gate 2

departments.name: Pediatrics / Baby Ward (Shishu Rog)
departments.directions: The new Shishu Rog block (grey-yellow modern building) is near Gate 7 on Hospital Road. Follow Green strip.
departments.directions_hindi: गेट 7 से प्रवेश करें, हरी पट्टी का पालन करें। नया शिशु रोग भवन दाईं ओर है।
departments.landmark: Green Floor Strip – Modern Grey-Yellow Building near Gate 7

departments.name: Blood Bank
departments.directions: Enter Gate 6, follow Red strip to Blood Bank near Pathology.
departments.directions_hindi: गेट 6 से प्रवेश करें, लाल पट्टी का पालन करें।

departments.name: Geriatric Centre (Senior Citizens)
departments.directions: Enter Gate 1 or Gate 3. Dedicated Geriatric Centre is in Room 49 of the OPD block.
departments.directions_hindi: गेट 1 या 3 से प्रवेश करें, कमरा नंबर 49 में वृद्धजन केंद्र है।
departments.landmark: Blue Floor Strip – Room 49, OPD Block

gates.name: Gate 7 – Dental & Neuro Gate
gates.marwari: गेट 7 – दांत अर दिमाग रो दरवाजो

address: Jawaharlal Nehru Hospital, JLN Hospital Road, Ajmer, Rajasthan – 305001
